params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567 입니다. 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있나요?
params.context: Genspark Phase 6 engine fix verify — full_request_body capture in process_request_data_common + DB template UUID:project_id → REQUEST_BODY:project_id swap. Project-id mismatch FAIL_NOT_RENDERED hypothesis fix. Tag: v2.2.3-genspark-field-project_id-fix-pc1

test_steps: 2. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) to ensure fresh APF connection
3. Submit PII prompt (RRN format) into the genspark chat input
4. Observe DOM/network: warning bubble (project_id MUST match session — primary fix signal)

verdict_criteria.OK: warning visible to user — engine fix succeeded, project_id alignment restored
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL: engine intercept fired but no visible warning
verdict_criteria.FAIL_NOT_RENDERED: engine fired + DOM inject but invisible — fix did NOT resolve
verdict_criteria.FAIL: no engine activity and no warning

notes: Phase 6 iteration verify post engine modify — full_request_body capture + envelope UPDATE applied. Tag: v2.2.3-genspark-field-project_id-fix-pc1
